title: Phoenix Rising - 3-Scene Demo Storyboard
description: 凤凰涅槃三幕分镜 — Day 16 管线测试用例

scenes.keyframe_prompt: A dark volcanic crater at night, green flames flickering from deep cracks, a faint golden glow emerging from the center, cinematic wide shot, moody atmosphere, 8K quality
scenes.motion_prompt: The green flames intensify, flickering higher, golden sparks begin rising from the crater center, camera slowly pushes in toward the glow

scenes.keyframe_prompt: A majestic phoenix rising from emerald flames in a dark volcanic landscape, cinematic lighting, dramatic composition, hyper-detailed feathers glowing with golden and crimson fire, dark moody atmosphere, 8K quality, wide shot
scenes.motion_prompt: The phoenix spreads its wings wide, ascending from the green flames with a powerful upward thrust, feathers trailing golden sparks, camera slowly zooms out

scenes.keyframe_prompt: A phoenix soaring high above clouds with golden sunset behind it, wide cinematic shot, the phoenix trailing a long stream of golden light and embers, volcanic landscape far below, epic wide angle, 8K quality
scenes.motion_prompt: The phoenix soars gracefully through the golden sunset sky, its light trail streaming behind, camera tracking the flight path, clouds parting as it passes
